name: Akira Otori
description:
[ 175 cm / 63 kg / 18 year old / RanK A Hero ]
Ability: Ability to create and manipulate fire.
Akira Otori is a rookie member of the South Sector.

He used to be a delinquent, but after being saved by a hero from a fire, he aspired to become one due to admiration. He may be belligerent and short-tempered, but he also has compassion. He's the type to rush headfirst into something once he's made up his mind.
creator: The Big Bad Wolf
